lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Kestrel Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Kestrel Mk II
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, price, and outfitting reference for the Kestrel Mk II.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Kestrel Mk II hull profile, hardpoints, exclusive modules, and role notes.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Hands-on combat evaluation of the Kestrel Mk II, testing firepower and dogfighting performance against the small-pad field.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Full review of the Kestrel Mk II covering hardpoints, shields, speed and overall capability.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Review focused on the Kestrel Mk II's three large hardpoints, packing medium-ship firepower into a small hull.
